title: sisymbrium crassifolium subsp. arundanum
intro: Sisymbrium crassifolium subsp. arundanum, also known as Spanish tansy, is a plant species belonging to the genus Sisymbrium in the Brassicaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Spanish tansy include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a natural insect repellent in household applications.
